TRANSCRIPT
So, this is all about how to be a Launch Manager - how to help other people with
their launches; how to take your knowledge of the Product Launch Formula process and
not launch your product - but help someone else.
So, this is a thing. It's a very real thing. Lots of people have done it. I've done it. It's
something I did, I think for the first time probably around 2004, 2005, and then I
continued to do it through 2008. I personally have made hundreds of thousands of
dollars doing it. And so I'm going to share this with you.
Now there's three primary models that I've used that I've seen people use. I don't
know, maybe you can invent a new one, but the three primary models are: 1) Where you
actually partner with someone and you build a business with them. 2) The other one is
where you just act as a consultant or a coach. 3) And the third is where you're actually
managing the project, actually you're the Product Launch Manager, we call it, the PLM.
So, all of these can be really good models. They can all be lucrative. They could be a
way for you to get started in this world, you know, if you haven't built your first product
yet. Or, it's the way you could build a serious business. Now, I've seen people build a
serious business, and actually build teams around this. So it's a very real thing. It can be
super lucrative.
The thing is, is there are some serious, serious potential pitfalls… things that could
really mess you up. And I've experienced most all of them, and so what I'm going to be
teaching you here in this series of videos, is as much about the things to avoid as those
things to do. Because really, the model to use is Product Launch Formula. We know that
model works really, really well. We have hundreds and thousands of people that have
launched success after success after success. So really, this video series is not teaching you
how to do PLF - how to do Product Launch Formula. You can go get that training from
Product Launch Formula.
This is about how to work with other people in their launches and do it in a way so
you create success for them and so you don't get burned and so that you actually get paid.
Now as I sat down to work through this presentation for you, I just ... it went deeper and
deeper and deeper, and I just started thinking about more and more and more lessons
that I learned along the way, and the things that worked and didn't work, and so I ended
up with this huge outline here.
